name: arcshot
description: ArcShot — artilharia tática em turnos pela Tehkné Solutions.

scripts.dev: npm run assets:build && npm run build -w @arcshot/game-core && npm run dev -w @arcshot/game
scripts.build: npm run build -w @arcshot/game-core && npm run assets:build && npm run build -w @arcshot/game && npm run build -w @arcshot/server
scripts.check: npm run assets:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
